name: be-sse-heartbeat
title: BE SSE heartbeat keepalive
description: Emit a periodic SSE keepalive comment (: keepalive\n\n) on GET /sse/{session_id} so an idle stream is never reaped by the local 7890 proxy / half-open TCP, and a true drop surfaces fast enough for native EventSource reconnect+Last-Event-ID replay to recover. Product code only (app/api/routers/sse.py); no test-code coupling. Must not corrupt the id:/event:/data: replay contract. Reproduce-then-confirm the freeze stops. Update sse-contract spec if keepalive becomes contractual (Rule 10).
creator: Drake
